title: tephrosia fertilis
intro: Tephrosia fertilis, also known as the golden leaf or yellow pea tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Tephrosia fertilis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also exhibiting antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often by boiling the roots or leaves in water, to create a herbal remedy for various health issues.
